User.title: User
User.description: A user of the SokoSense platform.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

photoURL.description: The user's profile picture URL or base64 data.

about.description: A description of what the user sells.

rating.description: The user's rating based on successful deals.

successfulDeals.description: The number of successful deals completed by the user.

followersCount.description: The number of followers the user has.

followingCount.description: The number of users this user is following.

Follow.title: Follow
Follow.description: A follow relationship between two users.

followerUid.description: The UID of the user who is following.

followedUid.description: The UID of the user being followed.

createdAt.description: When the follow relationship was created.

PhoneToEmail.title: Phone to Email Mapping
PhoneToEmail.description: A mapping from phone number to email address for login.

email.description: The email associated with the phone number.

Listing.title: Listing
Listing.description: A buy or sell offer for a farm product.

id.description: The unique identifier for the listing.

uid.description: The UID of the user who created the listing.

type.description: Whether the user is buying or selling.

crop.description: The name of the crop (e.g., tomatoes).

status.description: The current status of the listing.

Chat.title: Chat
Chat.description: A negotiation chat between a buyer and a seller.

id.description: The unique identifier for the chat.

listingId.description: The ID of the listing this chat is about.

lastMessage.description: The content of the last message.

updatedAt.description: When the chat was last updated.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: A single message within a chat.

id.description: The unique identifier for the message.

chatId.description: The ID of the chat this message belongs to.

id.description: The unique identifier for the notification.

uid.description: The UID of the user to notify.

read.description: Whether the notification has been read.

sourceUid.description: The UID of the user who triggered the notification.

listingId.description: The ID of the listing related to the notification.

/phone_to_email/{phoneNumber}.description: Phone to email mapping for login.
